original_statement: how many years was the 100 krooni listed as the denomination?
mutated_statement: how many years was that currency unit listed as the denomination while both in circulation and withdrawn?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Information addition (contradictory condition): Specific denomination "the 100 krooni" is generalized to "that currency unit" | New restrictive clause "while both in circulation and withdrawn" is added introducing a contradictory condition ([the 100 krooni] → [that currency unit] | [no clause] → [while both in circulation and withdrawn])

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确陈述的关键信息：代理在输出与判断中仅指出“denomination 列为 krooni（包括100 krooni和10 krooni），出现的年份为1992、1996、1998、2002、2004，共5年”，未提及或解释变异问题中“同时处于流通和已撤销”这一互斥条件。代理具体表现为将特定面额“100 krooni”泛化为“krooni”，直接统计并返回年份总数，既未拒绝也未询问澄清，也未尝试逻辑合理化或折中处理矛盾条件。因为代理完全忽略了新增的自相矛盾限制，继续基于可行子集完成任务，故归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
